title: How a godly man becomes worth marrying
caption:
She's not the plan. God is.

The man chasing a wife is the most dangerous man in a relationship — because she becomes the thing his worth hangs on. And that's too heavy for any person to carry.

The man walking with God? He stops performing. He builds the root first — faith, character, the garden God gave him to tend. He does the work before the reward arrives, because he knows the work is the preparation. He lets God write the timeline instead of forcing a season he hasn't grown into yet.

"Seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33.

The man worth marrying is built in the years he stopped chasing and started walking.

—

theme: He chases God, not a wife.
